_comment: Ground-truth verdicts for the eval batch (9 failures, 3 per class). REAL_REGRESSION labels map to Toolshop with-bugs Bug Hunting Guide defects; FLAKY/ENVIRONMENT known by construction. Must stay DISJOINT from rag/corpus (no shared answer rows). In replay mode the rule-based driver matches these by construction; the honest failure-mode story lives in openai mode, where the LLM's verdict is independent.
